---
title: "Tunnel to Claremont Loop"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="14.16" data-elevation="1716.54">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/tunnel-to-claremont-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>14.16</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>1716.54 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#d9ef8b;">55%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-to-claremont-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>7.92</td>
      <td>56.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>2.30</td>
      <td>16.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>1.48</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.26</td>
      <td>9.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>1.06</td>
      <td>7.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.13</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Climb Chunks

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-to-claremont-loop/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Climbs Only

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,378</td>
      <td>5.2</td>
      <td>51 ± 24</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Tunnel Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>1,378</td>
      <td>5.2</td>
      <td>51 ± 24</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

### With Rest Periods

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,378</td>
      <td>14.2</td>
      <td>98 ± 38</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Tunnel Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>1,378</td>
      <td>5.2</td>
      <td>51 ± 24</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>7.1</td>
      <td>38</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-to-claremont-loop/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>3.7</td>
      <td>26.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>2.5</td>
      <td>17.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>2.3</td>
      <td>16.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>13.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>9.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>6.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>1.8</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::
